enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual Saturday vlog while high, describing his inverted sleep schedule (going to bed at sunrise), working on Google Earth mapping projects and YouTube videos, and dealing with a broken heater that forced him to shower at a nearby club.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: prefers going to bed at sunrise and has always been that way; embraces it rather than fighting it
finds it genuinely fascinating, even while high

entities: Bay of Declaration (likely 'Baie de la Déclaration')
